---
title: "Week 1 — AI fluency foundations"
subtitle: "The 4 D's: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence"
---

## Topics

- What "AI fluency" means, and why it matters for biology research.
- The 4 D's framework.
- First pass at applying the framework to your own workflow.

## Before class

Read:

- [Delegation](../fluency/delegation.qmd)
- [Description](../fluency/description.qmd)
- [Discernment](../fluency/discernment.qmd)
- [Diligence](../fluency/diligence.qmd)

## In class

- Introductions and workflow audit.
- Live walkthrough: the 4 D's applied to a BLAST-and-summarize task.
- Small-group exercise: classify tasks from your own work with the delegation rubric.

## After class

- **Deliverable**: a short reflection (≤ 500 words) on one task you will *start* delegating, one you will *stop* delegating, and why. Use the [Syllabus disclosure template](../course-syllabus.qmd#ai-use-policy).

## Supplementary

*TODO: link slides, recordings, any demo notebooks.*
